poem:
The empty house echoes with my wandering steps,
Each room a question mark, each door a guess.

I climb the narrow stair toward distant light,
My fingers trace the banister's worn grain.

The spike of hope pierces through morning fog,
Sharp clarity cuts through the haze of doubt.

This path grows spicy with anticipation,
Heat builds beneath my skin like summer rain.

At last the spiny truth reveals itself,
Its thorned beauty more perfect than I dreamed.

I wander through gardens where nothing will plant,
Seeds scattered on barren ground, hope growing scant.

The sun seems to arise on distant shores,
While I drift through these unfamiliar doors.

From this old chair I glimpse a clearer way,
The path ahead grows brighter with each ray.

Like Clair who walked these roads before my time,
I sense the rhythm, almost catch the rhyme.

Sweet cider flows where bitter waters ran,
The journey's end unfolds within my plan.

At last I light this victory cigar,
The treasure found was never really far.

I built my house upon uncertain ground,
Where shifting shadows left me spinning round.

My heart beats stronger as the path grows clear,
The rhythm tells me answers drawing near.

Upon this bench I pause to catch my breath,
Still wandering through this maze of life and death.

When darkness comes, I know that someone helps
To guide me through these valleys where hope dwells.

The morning air feels fresh against my skin,
As dawn breaks through—the light creeps slowly in.

Now Welsh songs rise from valleys I have known,
At last I stand upon this hill, my own.

The audio of silence fills my ears tonight,
As I wander through shadows, searching for light.

Among the twins of doubt and hope I stand,
Grasping for meaning I don't understand.

My liver aches with the weight of unseen truth,
While wisdom dances just beyond my youth.

In grief I stumble through this endless maze,
Lost in the fog of these uncertain days.

With sword I wield against the stubborn dark,
Still missing the target, wide of the mark.

Sweet cider flows when understanding breaks—
The scolding voice that finally awakes.

The train pulls away through empty stations at dawn,
Carrying dreams that feel already gone.

This house holds whispers of what might be,
Shadows that dance just beyond what I see.

What I have shown barely breaks through the night,
Yet something stirs in the gathering light.

With sword in hand, I stand at the gate,
Steel gleaming bright, but still I must wait.

Though swollen rivers may block my way,
The current speaks of a brighter day.

I swore an oath when the journey began—
Now destiny swoops down into my hands.

Dawn breaks and I arose from restless sleep,
Through morning mist, my wandering spirit weep.

I leant against the windowsill in doubt,
While shadows danced and whispered all about.

In darkness, we are equal in our fears,
Yet somewhere light awaits beyond these tears.

An ideal glimmers faintly through the haze,
Like distant stars that guide through darker days.

Each petal falls but teaches how to grow,
That endings birth the seeds we need to sow.

I've earned this medal forged from trial and pain,
The gavel falls—my victory's not in vain.

I wander through this empty house at dawn,
The silence tells me I have chosen wrong.

I enter pathways lit by fading stars,
Hope flickers dim, yet something calls from afar.

A teacher knows that wisdom comes with time,
I feel the truth approaching through the grime.

I leapt across the chasm of my doubt,
One foot has found the path I've dreamed about.

This metal heart grows softer as I see
The pattern forming what I'm meant to be.

I work this lathe with hands that finally know
The shape of all the places I must go.

The crane stands motionless in morning mist,
While secrets hide in shadows I have missed.

A mouse scurries through the hollow walls,
As darkness deepens and the silence calls.

The theme emerges faintly through the haze,
Like whispered hints in these uncertain days.

My modem flickers with a hopeful glow,
One truth revealed, though much I do not know.

Behind the hedge, I sense what lies concealed,
The answer close but not quite yet revealed.

At the wedge of knowing, I falter still,
The final truth just beyond my will.

I stare into the void of unknown paths ahead,
Where shadows dance and whisper what I dread.

This unbox holds no treasures, just empty space,
Another door that will not show your face.

At this point wandering seems my only choice,
Still searching for the echo of your voice.

My glove reaches out but cannot find the way,
Though something stirs within the growing day.

Hello, sweet melody, you're almost here,
The music swells, your presence drawing near.

Like jello set, my doubts dissolve at last,
The cello sings—our journey's shadows passed.

I stare into the void where answers hide,
Lost in the vastness with no faithful guide.

The smoke of confusion still clouds my mind,
Though glimpses of truth I'm starting to find.

My spine straightens now with growing hope,
As clarity emerges within my scope.

At last the scene unfolds before my eyes,
The mystery solved beneath morning skies.

I stare into the void of unknown paths ahead,
Lost in shadows where my weary footsteps tread.

The mound of doubts grows higher with each passing day,
Still wandering through this endless, winding way.

Like some alien visitor in foreign land,
I glimpse a truth I'm just beginning to understand.

A penny's worth of wisdom starts to shine,
These scattered pieces slowly fall in line.

What once was eaten by uncertainty and fear,
Now feeds the hope that draws the answer near.

Across this ocean of my searching heart,
I find the truth that was there from the start—vegan.

I stare into the void, seeking what lies hidden
The path ahead uncertain, my spirit still unbidden

Through smoke and haze I wander, the way still unclear
Each step a whispered question in the gathering drear

My spine grows cold with doubt as shadows multiply
The answer slips like water beneath the starless sky

I slide through endless valleys where echoes fade away
Still searching for the truth that will illuminate my day

I swore I'd find the answer though darkness blocks my sight
A glimmer breaks the silence, a spark within the night

The surge of understanding floods through my weary soul
At last the mystery opens, and I am finally whole

The dawn arose with empty promises and hollow dreams,
While shadows danced where nothing was as it seems.

I point my compass toward an uncertain star,
Yet still the destination feels impossibly far.

I moved through morning mist with growing hope,
Learning to navigate this treacherous slope.

The earth grew mould beneath my searching feet,
As persistence whispered that I'd not retreat.

Like mocha steam that curls and nearly clears,
I taste the answer hovering close to tears.

Sweet mochi melts upon my eager tongue,
Yet still the final song remains unsung.

I wander through this empty house at dawn,
Where silence echoes and my hope feels drawn.

The morning roast burns bitter in the pan,
As shadows lengthen where my search began.

I point toward distant stars that barely gleam,
Still chasing fragments of a fading dream.

The world spins on while I remain in place,
Yet something stirs—a hint of saving grace.

A blond light breaks across the eastern sky,
My heart lifts up as darkness says goodbye.

The block of ice around my soul gives way,
As bloom unfolds to greet the newborn day.

The audio crackles through empty rooms tonight,
While shadows dance beyond my weary sight.

This house of dreams feels hollow, cold, and stark,
Yet something stirs within the growing dark.

As seasons turn and winter's breath grows near,
I sense a truth is waiting to appear.

The sunny days feel distant, almost lost,
But warmth still lives beneath the morning frost.

Through valleys where I slump beneath the weight,
A glimmer shows—perhaps it's not too late.

At last the skull beneath reveals its bone,
The secret I have searched for is my own.

In silence I wander through chambers of sound,
Where audio whispers fade, lost and unfound.

The store of my hopes holds treasures inside,
As scattered dreams gather, refusing to hide.

At last in the roost where my spirit finds rest,
The dawn breaks complete—I have passed every test.

When morning breaks, I arise from restless sleep,
The path ahead feels murky, shadows deep.

Along the coast where uncertainty dwells,
I search for signs the distant lighthouse tells.

In the salon mirror, glimpses start to show,
A clearer face emerges from below.

Like a shark that circles, sensing prey,
I feel the truth is not so far away.

A snack of hope sustains me through the hunt,
Each small discovery sharpens what I want.

The sauna's steam reveals what I have sought—
The squad of answers that my heart has brought.

I wander through shadows, lost and about,
Searching for answers in fields of doubt.

The house stands empty, windows dark,
No warmth within, no guiding spark.

I pound against doors that will not yield,
My weary hands refuse to heal.

The mound of earth holds secrets deep,
Where buried dreams in darkness sleep.

To moult these fears, shed old skin tight,
Dawn breaks slowly, bringing light.

The mould of past begins to break,
A mogul's wisdom starts to wake.

The crane stands motionless in morning mist,
While answers drift beyond my searching fist.

I pound the earth but find no fertile ground,
Just echoes of my hopes without a sound.

Like ghosts that whisper secrets in the night,
I sense the truth approaching into sight.

The air grows moist with promise drawing near,
As shadows part to make the pathway clear.

At last I hoist the banner of my quest,
And claim the prize that puts my soul to rest.

I strain to hear the audio of distant dreams,
But silence swallows every hopeful sound.

The crane stands motionless in morning mist,
Its patience teaching what I've yet to learn.

Among the plans I've scattered on the ground,
A glimmer catches light—the path grows clear.

The stank of old defeats begins to fade,
As victory blooms sweet upon my tongue.

I stare into the morning mist, uncertain of the way,
The path ahead seems tangled, lost in shadow and decay.

Alone I wander through the maze of doubt and restless night,
A glimmer stirs within my chest, a flicker of distant light.

Agile thoughts begin to dance, my spirit starts to soar,
The darkness lifts its heavy veil, revealing something more.

Awake at last, my soul breaks free from slumber's binding chain,
The world unfolds in brilliant hues, I'm whole and born again.

I wander through this empty house alone,
Searching for something I have never known.

The trail grows cold beneath my weary feet,
Yet still I sense we're destined here to meet.

My thoughts turn crazy in the fading light,
But deep within burns hope's persistent bright.

The page before me stretches blank and wide,
While whispers call from somewhere deep inside.

Like dwarf stars burning in the endless night,
I press ahead though nothing feels quite right.

At last gamma rays pierce through the dark,
And guava sweetness answers my heart's spark.

The stone path leads nowhere, cold beneath my feet,
Each step echoes hollow in this endless street.

Through trial and error, I stumble in the dark,
Searching for some sign, some guiding spark.

I admit defeat seems near, my spirit worn thin,
Yet somewhere deep inside, hope stirs within.

In antic desperation, I reach toward the light,
The shadows start to lift, the end comes into sight.

At last I find the attic where memories are stored,
The treasure I've been seeking, my long-awaited reward.

I wander through this empty house alone,
Searching for what I cannot call my own.

The pain grows acute in morning light,
Still grasping shadows, nothing feels quite right.

Among women gathered, I stand apart,
Their laughter echoes, but can't reach my heart.

A gentle guide appears along my way,
Pointing toward hope at break of day.

Like a queen ascending to her throne,
I sense the prize I've always known.

At last, a buyer for my weary soul—
The missing piece that makes me whole.

I stare into the void of what I cannot grasp,
Wandering through shadows that slip from my clasp.

The score remains unclear in this endless game,
Each step forward feels exactly the same.

To serve a purpose greater than my doubt,
I sense the path but cannot map it out.

Super strength won't break these stubborn walls,
Yet something whispers before darkness falls.

More sore than ever from this long pursuit,
Still I press on toward forbidden fruit.

At last I shred the veil that hid the way,
And find the truth that waited all today.

The stone lies cold beneath my searching hands,
While shadows whisper secrets I don't understand.

Along the ridge I wander, lost and worn,
My spirit heavy with the weight of scorn.

The chime rings distant in the morning air,
A melody that hints at treasures rare.

We dance together in the golden light,
Almost touching what will make things right.

The lance pierces through the veil at last,
Victory blooms from struggles of the past.

The morning arose with empty promises,
Silence echoing where answers should be.

A distant light flickers through the darkness,
One small beacon in the endless void.

In the depths I mined for hidden treasures,
Finding only fragments of what might be.

The ditty plays a tune almost familiar,
Its melody dancing close to truth.

Dimly now the pattern starts emerging,
Shadows shaping into something known.

Through the dingy haze of failed attempts,
Victory spins just beyond my grasp.

Dawn arose with whispered promises unfulfilled,
Shadows cast where certainty should dwell.

The trail winds through valleys of uncertainty,
Each step forward feels like retreat.

Even champions stumble in the darkness,
Doubt creeps through cracks in resolve.

Like a panda lost in foreign bamboo,
Hope flickers but refuses to die.

At the hedge between despair and breakthrough,
Light begins to pierce the gloom.

The horde of answers parts at last,
Victory emerges from the storm.

The morning arose with promises unfulfilled,
While shadows danced where hope had spilled.

At lunch I wondered if answers hide
In simple moments, pushed aside.

Guilt whispers that I've missed the way,
Though fragments glimmer through the gray.

The river's bulge carries distant light,
As currents shift from wrong toward right.

What seemed a fluke now feels like fate—
The universe conspired to illuminate.

I arose before dawn, fumbling in the dark,
Searching for something I could not yet mark.

With style I approached, though still incomplete,
Sensing the answer was almost concrete.

At last the slime reveals its hidden truth,
The path now clear from all my sleuth.

I stare into the void, seeking what cannot be found,
Lost in shadows where no familiar voices sound.

The hound runs circles through my restless mind,
Still searching for the truth I cannot find.

Not in my backyard, yet something starts to gleam,
A whisper of hope threading through my dream.

The path grows clear, lined with possibility,
Each step forward feels like destiny.

At last the fabric of understanding shows—
Soft linen truth, and finally peace that flows.

I stare into the void, seeking what was lost,
My gaze falls short, another bridge uncrossed.

The tenet I once held begins to bend,
As shadows whisper of what might transcend.

At last I name the theft that stole my peace—
In claiming what was mine, I find release.

The crane stands silent in the morning mist,
Its shadow falls where answers don't exist.

This house holds secrets I have yet to find,
Though whispers echo in my restless mind.

These moments stretch like hours in the dark,
Each breath a question, each heartbeat a mark.

The old sheds crumble at the garden's edge,
I'm walking closer to the sacred pledge.

Upon the shelf sit memories half-revealed,
The truth awaits, no longer to be sealed.

At last the sheep come wandering safely home,
No more through endless valleys need I roam.

I wander through this empty house alone,
Where silence echoes what I've never known.

Like a giant shadow cast across the land,
I reach for something just beyond my hand.

The seeds I've grown have withered in the drought,
Still searching for what life is all about.

Down in the gully where the water flows,
A clearer path begins to show.

The guppy swims against the current's pull,
My heart grows lighter, almost full.

No longer gummy with despair and doubt,
I've found the truth I can't live without.

I wander through this empty house alone,
Searching for something I have never known.

Once I loved the way the morning breaks,
Now I question every choice it makes.

Let me prove that I can find my way,
Though the path grows darker every day.

Like scenes from an old movie reel,
I'm learning what is false and real.

At last I hear my inner voice,
Speaking clear above the noise.

Now I walk in perfect vogue,
My journey's end, my epilogue.

I stare into the void where answers hide,
Lost in shadows with no thread to guide.

The mound of doubt grows heavy in my chest,
Still wandering far from any hopeful rest.

Like a pilot glimpsing distant shore,
I sense the path though can't see what's in store.

The engine cools but something stirs within,
A whisper tells me I'm about to begin.

Lowly though I am, I feel the spark,
Almost there now, emerging from the dark.

My mind goes loopy with the joy I feel—
The lobby opens, and the truth is real.

The audio fades to silence, no clear path ahead,
I wander through darkness where whispers have fled.

Among the plant roots I search for a sign,
Some fragment of truth in this tangled design.

The steam rises slowly, revealing small clues,
A glimpse of the answer I'm yearning to choose.

These tales that I've gathered begin to align,
Each piece finds its place in the grand design.

Through maths and through logic, the pattern grows clear,
The solution emerges, drawing me near.

At last I am hasty to claim what is mine,
The treasure I sought in this moment divine.

I stare into the distance, seeking what lies beyond
The horizon holds its secrets, of which I'm not yet fond

The sandy shore beneath me shifts with every step I take
Each grain a whispered promise of the path I'm meant to make

A salvo of determination fires within my chest
Though shadows still surround me, I continue on my quest

The slope grows ever steeper as I climb toward the light
Each foothold brings me closer to what's hidden from my sight

The solid ground reminds me that persistence pays its due
Though mystery still lingers, I can feel I'm breaking through

A sloop appears before me on the water, small and lone
Upon the shoal it rests at last—the treasure I have known

I wander through this empty house alone,
Seeking what I've never clearly known.

The great expanse before me holds no clue,
Still lost within this morning's heavy dew.

The metro carries strangers past my door,
Yet hints of light begin to shine once more.

A theft of clarity still clouds my mind,
But fragments of the truth I start to find.

The tenet that has guided me rings true,
Though shadows still obscure my clearer view.

This tepid hope now warms into delight—
My teddy bear emerges in the light.

I wander through this empty house at dusk,
The silence heavy, thick as gathering musk.

The stern wind cuts across the barren field,
Where broken dreams refuse to bend or yield.

I quicken to a desperate, breathless speed,
Still grasping for the thing I truly need.

Down hillsides where the autumn leaves all slide,
I search for what has always been denied.

The temperature begins to rise and swelt,
As hope stirs deep in places I have felt.

At last the magic weaves its sacred spell—
I find the truth I've known but could not tell.

I stare into the void of morning mist,
Searching for signs that I have somehow missed.

The feast is eaten, hunger finally sated,
Victory blooms where patience once had waited.

The audio of my heartbeat drowns out all other sound,
As I wander through this darkness where no path can be found.

An alien feeling stirs within, a spark of something true,
The fog begins to lift and show a clearer point of view.

Like an angel's whispered guidance leading me along,
I sense I'm drawing closer to where I belong.

At last I find my ankle deep in solid ground,
The journey's end before me, safe and sound.

I stare into the void where answers hide,
Lost in shadows where my hopes collide.

The music calls, I start to dance around,
But still the truth remains yet to be found.

A badge of honor waits beyond my reach,
Though whispers hint at what these depths might teach.

With movements agile, swift as morning light,
I sense the dawn emerging from the night.

A peaceful glade opens before my eyes,
Where almost all the mystery now lies.

At last I find the grade I've climbed to earn,
The summit reached through every twist and turn.

I wander through this empty house alone,
Searching shadows where no answers are sown.

The train carries me toward distant light,
Rails gleaming silver through the endless night.

Each grade I climb reveals a clearer view,
Though mist still shrouds the summit I pursue.

My draft takes shape with careful, measured strokes,
Almost complete, like fire before it smokes.

The drama unfolds in perfect harmony,
At last I've found the truth that sets me free.

The crane stands still in morning mist, its shadow long and thin,
While somewhere in the distance, my journey must begin.

We gather round for chats about the path that lies ahead,
Though whispers in the wind suggest a different road instead.

At last I find the clasp that holds my scattered dreams in place,
And feel the warm embrace of home written on my face.

I wandered through the garden where each plant held secrets close,
Their whispered names like scattered seeds that drift where no one knows.

The apple tree stands heavy with its burden, branches bent,
Yet something in its shadow speaks of promises half-sent.

In alpha light of morning when the mist begins to clear,
I catch a glimpse of something that draws my searching near.

The hawk soars high aloft above the fields I've walked so long,
Its cry echoes the longing that has made my journey strong.

This album holds the memories of paths I've tried before,
Each page a step that brings me closer to the hidden door.

At last the truth unfolds amply like dawn across the hill,
And all my wandering finds its home in this moment, bright and still.

The crane stands motionless in morning mist,
While shadows dance where clarity once lived.

Alert to whispers in the stirring air,
I catch fragments of a truth half-shared.

A rogue wind carries scents of distant hope,
Through valleys where my weary spirit gropes.

Ready now to face what lies ahead,
I feel the pull of paths I've never tread.

To react with wisdom, not with haste,
These lessons learned shall never go to waste.

Rearm yourself with courage, heart made whole,
In rehab's grace, I've found my truest soul.

The morning arose with whispers of possibility,
Yet shadows still concealed the path ahead.

Through pasta dinners and familiar routines,
I glimpsed the outline of what might be.

In the basin of my searching heart,
Something deeper began to take shape.

The air grew moist with anticipation,
As fragments aligned like distant stars.

At last, an oasis bloomed before me,
Where all my wandering found its home.

I stare into the void of unknown paths,
Wandering through shadows that obscure my way.

The sound of distant hopes grows ever fainter,
Lost echoes bouncing off these barren walls.

Through slime and muck I wade with growing courage,
Each step revealing glimpses of the truth.

I slink closer now, my heart beats faster,
The destination shimmers just ahead.

How slick the surface of this hard-won victory,
I stand triumphant in the morning light.

The audio crackles through empty rooms tonight,
While shadows dance where answers used to be.

I tried to find the path through tangled thorns,
But every step led deeper into doubt.

This basin holds the fragments I have gathered,
Each piece reflecting what I'm searching for.

The basic truths emerge from all the chaos,
Like dawn that breaks across a restless sea.

Sweet basil grows where I have learned to tend it,
Its fragrance filling spaces once left bare.

The house stands empty in the fading light,
While shadows whisper secrets through the night.

A stale wind carries hints of what might be,
As dawn breaks slowly over distant sea.

Seven paths diverge before my weary feet,
Yet none seem destined where my heart will meet.

The sedan idles at the crossroads still,
Waiting for direction, waiting for my will.

My setup feels familiar, almost right,
Like puzzle pieces shifting into sight.

The servo turns, the mechanism clicks,
And suddenly the lock within me lifts.

I cast my hopes like stone into the void,
Searching for truth in shadows unexplored.

The molar ache of doubt gnaws at my soul,
While distant echoes whisper I'm not whole.

I stumble through the darkness, lost and wrong,
Yet sense a melody within my song.

The harvest of my efforts yields small crops,
But still I climb though weary spirit drops.

Like warming broth, hope stirs within my chest,
I feel the pull toward my destined rest.

Though broke in spirit, fragments start to mend,
I glimpse the dawn approaching journey's end.

I stretch my neck like a crane toward distant shores,
But shadows swallow the path I'm searching for.

The outer rim of understanding calls to me,
A glimmer breaks through uncertainty.

Time flows like a river toward its end,
Hope builds as pieces start to blend.

With tiger strength I prowl the edge of knowing,
The pattern clear, my confidence growing.

Each fiber of my being pulls me near,
The answer hovers, almost here.

Like cider warming on an autumn night,
I'm close enough to taste insight.

I cast my hopes upon the stone-cold ground,
Where shadows dance but truth cannot be found.

The teacher's voice echoes through empty halls,
While wisdom waits behind these silent walls.

The meter of my heartbeat starts to change,
As patterns shift within this searching range.

My steps grow lefty, awkward but more sure,
The path reveals itself, though still obscure.

Like theft in darkness, answers start to form,
Truth pierces through the long and restless storm.

The quiet moment when all pieces align,
At last the scattered fragments are divine.

The HOUSE stands empty, windows dark and cold,
Where dreams once lived, now stories left untold.

A ROBOT walks through chambers of the past,
Searching for warmth that wasn't meant to last.

The FRONT door creaks, a whisper of what's near,
Hope stirs within as shadows start to clear.

The WORLD awakens with a gentle sigh,
Truth glimmers softly in the morning sky.

GLORY breaks through like dawn across the hill,
The path grows bright, my heart begins to fill.

No need for STORY when the light shines true,
IVORY towers gleaming, fresh and new.

I stare into the void, grasping at shadows,
Lost among whispers that drift through the meadows.

The match I strike flickers but fails to ignite,
Still wandering blindly through depths of the night.

I point toward horizons that shimmer and fade,
Seeking the path that my heart hopes I've made.

Like driftwood I float on uncertain tides,
Yet something within me now quietly guides.

To adopt a new rhythm, I steady my stride,
The answer draws closer—I sense it beside.

At last I am afoot on the trail I have sought,
The journey complete with the wisdom it brought.

The crane stands motionless in morning mist,
While I wander through shadows that shouldn't exist.

In court I plead my case to empty air,
But justice hides beyond my desperate prayer.

Each chunk of hope I gather feeds my soul,
As fragments start to form a greater whole.

No chump am I—the path reveals at last,
My journey's end makes sense of all I've passed.

I stare into the endless night sky above,
Searching for signs of what I'm dreaming of.

Upon this mount I stand with hope renewed,
The distant light grows bright, my faith pursued.

At last the comet blazes overhead,
Its brilliant tail erases every dread.

When morning arose with its gentle light,
I wandered lost in shadows of doubt.

The snail traced silver paths through dew,
While I searched for signs barely true.

Against the stack of fading hope,
I climbed each dream's uncertain slope.

Deep in the swamp, truth finally gleamed—
The secret place I'd always dreamed.

I wandered through this empty house of dreams,
Where silence echoes louder than it seems.

I think of paths that twist beyond my sight,
Each thought a whisper fading into night.

I claim no wisdom in this restless search,
Just hope that trembles like leaves on a birch.

The world grows weird beneath my weary feet,
As shadows dance where earth and heaven meet.

Around this pivot point, my spirit turns,
While deep within, a quiet fire burns.

At last I'm dizzy with the joy I've found,
My heart spinning free from solid ground.

The audio crackles through static-filled air,
I wander blind through shadows everywhere.

This story unfolds with whispered clues,
Hope stirs within, though much I still lose.

The sport of seeking draws me deeper in,
Each step forward feels like I might win.

With oath I'm sworn to see this journey through,
The path grows clearer, destination true.

Upon this shore I stand with growing light,
The answer dances just beyond my sight.

At last I'm sober, clarity complete,
The truth revealed makes victory so sweet.

The morning toast grows cold upon the plate,
While shadows whisper of some distant fate.

A gentle shine breaks through the clouded door,
Hope stirs within like waves upon the shore.

The merchant's spice fills markets with perfume,
Yet still I wander through this fragrant gloom.

With words grown snide, the bitter truth takes hold,
That warmth lies buried deeper than foretold.

The farmer's swine root deep beneath the earth,
Seeking the soil that gives their hunger worth.

Along my spine, a shiver runs at last,
As if the answer trembles, unsurpassed.

I bid adieu to certainty's embrace,
Wandering through shadows without a trace.

The roads I've traveled lead nowhere true,
Each path dissolving in morning's dew.

In clash of doubt against my will,
I search for answers, yearning still.

Though staid and steady seems my quest,
Hope flickers faintly in my chest.

Sadly I stumble, yet sense the way,
Light breaking through the endless gray.

At last I stand on ground so sandy,
Victory sweet, triumph so handy.

My heart beats wild in unknown territory,
Searching for paths through this vast mystery.

The sound of distant bells rings faintly near,
A whispered promise that the way grows clear.

Money can't buy what I'm seeking here,
But golden threads begin to appear.

My nosy wandering brings me closer still,
To secrets hidden beyond this hill.

Sweet honey drips from branches overhead,
Marking the trail where angels fear to tread.

At last I find my faithful envoy waits,
Standing ready at heaven's gates.

I gather crumbs of bread along the empty path,
Each morsel leads me nowhere, lost in aftermath.

The court of dreams seems distant, justice out of reach,
Yet whispers in the shadows hint at what they teach.

Sorry for my stumbling, yet hope begins to gleam,
The fragments start aligning with my searching dream.

In sport there lies a rhythm, almost within my grasp,
The prize feels nearly tangible, held in trembling clasp.

My sword cuts through the darkness, blade gleaming sharp and true,
Victory stands before me, waiting to break through.

At last I stand here sworn to honor what I've found,
The oath of perseverance echoes, victory's sweet sound.

The morning arose with promises untold,
Yet shadows still lingered where answers should unfold.

This house feels empty, its rooms incomplete,
Still wandering halls where truth and mystery meet.

The door stays close but won't reveal its key,
I press against barriers I cannot see.

Like a moose in fog, I stumble through the dark,
Missing the trail, unable to find my mark.

My grip grows loose on hope I've held too tight,
The path ahead dissolves from view and sight.

The wild goose leads me further from the shore,
Lost in the mist, I can't find what I'm searching for.
